mem_no.text: ช่วงทะเบียน

age_mem.text: ช่วงอายุการเป็นสมาชิก

age_life.text: ช่วงอายุของสมาชิก

mem_salary.text: ช่วงเงินเดือน

period_share.text: ช่วงงวดหุ้น

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!mem_no!' as mem_no , '!mem_no_1!' as mem_no1 , '!mem_no_2!' as mem_no2
, '!age_mem!' as age_mem , '!age_mem_1!' as age_mem1 , '!age_mem_2!' as age_mem2
, '!mem_status!' as mem_status
, '!age_life!' as age_life , '!age_life_1!' as age_life1 , '!age_life_2!' as age_life2
, '!sex!' as sex
, '!mem_salary!' as mem_salary , '!mem_salary_1!' as mem_salary1 , '!mem_salary_2!' as mem_salary2
, '!period_share!' as period_share , '!period_share_1!' as period_share1 , '!period_share_2!' as period_share2
, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , trim(sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename)||trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name)||' '||trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname)as member_name , trim(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no)||' - '||trim(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name)as member_group_name , trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),0,3)) as mem_age /*อายุการเป็นสมาชิก*/ , trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0,3)) as life_age /*อายุชีวิต*/ , (CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex WHEN 'M' THEN 'ชาย' ELSE 'หญิง' END)as sex_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_name , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount , sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve , (CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card WHEN null THEN null ELSE pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) END)as id_card
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_member_work_info , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status
WHERE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no AND sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code
AND (CASE '!mem_no!' WHEN null THEN (select all(tab.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select tab.membership_no from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.membership_no between '!mem_no_1!' and '!mem_no_2!') END)= (CASE (select tab.membership_no from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.membership_no between '!mem_no_1!' and '!mem_no_2!') WHEN null THEN (select all(tab.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select tab.membership_no from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.membership_no between '!mem_no_1!' and '!mem_no_2!') END)
AND (CASE '!age_mem!' WHEN null THEN (select all(trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),0,3))) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),0,3)) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),0,3)) between '!age_mem_1!' and '!age_mem_2!') END)= (CASE (select trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),0,3)) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),0,3)) between '!age_mem_1!' and '!age_mem_2!') WHEN null THEN (select all(trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),0,3))) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),0,3)) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),0,3)) between '!age_mem_1!' and '!age_mem_2!') END)
AND (CASE '!mem_status!' WHEN null THEN (select all(tab.member_status_code) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select tab.member_status_code from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.member_status_code = '!mem_status!') END)= (CASE (select tab.member_status_code from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.member_status_code = '!mem_status!') WHEN null THEN (select all(tab.member_status_code) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select tab.member_status_code from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.member_status_code = '!mem_status!') END)
AND (CASE '!age_life!' WHEN null THEN (select all(trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0,3))) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0,3)) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0,3)) between '!age_life_1!' and '!age_life_2!') END)= (CASE (select trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0,3)) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0,3)) between '!age_life_1!' and '!age_life_2!') WHEN null THEN (select all(trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0,3))) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0,3)) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and trim(substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0,3)) between '!age_life_1!' and '!age_life_2!') END)
AND (CASE '!sex!' WHEN null THEN (select all(tab.sex) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select tab.sex from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.sex = '!sex!') END)= (CASE (select tab.sex from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.sex = '!sex!') WHEN null THEN (select all(tab.sex) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select tab.sex from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.sex = '!sex!') END)
AND (CASE '!mem_salary!' WHEN null THEN (select all(tab.salary_amount) from sc_mem_m_member_work_info tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select tab.salary_amount from sc_mem_m_member_work_info tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.salary_amount between '!mem_salary_1!' and '!mem_salary_2!') END)= (CASE (select trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)::text) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)::text) between '!mem_salary_1!' and '!mem_salary_2!') WHEN null THEN (select all(tab.salary_amount) from sc_mem_m_member_work_info tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select tab.salary_amount from sc_mem_m_member_work_info tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.salary_amount between '!mem_salary_1!' and '!mem_salary_2!') END)
AND (CASE '!period_share!' WHEN null THEN (select all(tab.period_recrieve) from sc_mem_m_share_mem tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select tab.period_recrieve from sc_mem_m_share_mem tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.period_recrieve between '!period_share_1!' and '!period_share_2!') END)= (CASE (select tab.period_recrieve from sc_mem_m_share_mem tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.period_recrieve between '!period_share_1!' and '!period_share_2!') WHEN null THEN (select all(tab.period_recrieve) from sc_mem_m_share_mem tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ELSE (select tab.period_recrieve from sc_mem_m_share_mem tab where tab.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and tab.period_recrieve between '!period_share_1!' and '!period_share_2!') END)
/*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
